task.AutoEssence.label: 🎱Essence Farm
task.AutoEssence.description:
Automatically challenge heavily accumulated points.
## WARNING:
- Please make sure to enable the **Global Hotkey** option in **[Settings] - [Hotkey]**, and remember the **End Task** key. When the program fails, long-press this key to stop.
- Please make sure to start the task **near the accumulation point to be farmed** or at the **accumulation point start page**.
option.AutoEssenceDoOverride.label: Use Inscription Vouchers
option.AutoEssenceDoOverride.description: If inscription is needed, please select the attribute to be inscribed on the accumulation point start interface in advance, and ensure sufficient inscription vouchers (if not enough, non-inscription collection will be performed).
option.AutoEssenceDoObtain.label: Obtain Rewards
option.AutoEssenceDoObtain.description: When enabled, it will obtain rewards after each round of challenge, otherwise it will discard and reset.
option.AutoEssenceRepeatCount.label: Loop Execution
option.AutoEssenceRepeatCount.descriptio: If "Obtain Rewards" is also checked, please ensure sufficient stamina (otherwise the task will end early)
option.EssenceFilterAfterBattle.label: Essence Filter After Battle
option.EssenceFilterAfterBattle.descript: Automatically perform essence filtering after battle.
option.AutoEssenceChallengeMode.label: Challenge Mode
option.AutoEssenceChallengeMode.descript:
## TIPS:
- Walk mode only relies on turrets for output. Please **place as many turrets as possible** at the accumulation point, but do not place them too close to the trigger point.
- Walk mode does not involve automatic combat. Please switch the foreground character to **one with strong survivability** and configure sufficient **health recovery items**.
---

task.AutoEcoFarm.label: 🌾Eco-Farm
task.AutoEcoFarm.description:
## Task Function:
The task will automatically store all items in the backpack with one click before starting (enabled by default), then automatically complete harvesting, planting, watering, and other related operations.
## Notice - Please prepare before starting the task:
1. **Please place the Wuling Integrated Industrial Core near the edge of the Ecological Farm** (east side of the map) to prevent auto-pathfinding from getting stuck.
2. **Please bring a full team of 3 teammates**; harvesting mostly relies on teammates. The lead character only provides guidance; missing teammates will result in huge losses of farmland.
3. Please set the game language to Simplified Chinese; OCR does not support other languages yet.
## Recommendations:
1. Arrange farmland in a **dense formation as close to the center as possible**, preferably square, to avoid misses.
2. Try not to place sprinklers on the **diagonal** of the farm, as this may cause jamming.
task.AutoEcoFarm.option.SelectFarm.label: Custom Auto-Harvest Zones
task.AutoEcoFarm.option.GotoWulin.label: Wuling - Wuling City
task.AutoEcoFarm.option.FarmlandFindingS:
## Details:
1. **Diagonal Harvesting**: The character runs from the bottom-right to the top-left, harvesting along the way. **Requirement**: Plots must be placed in a standard rectangle, or edge crops will be missed.
2. **Center Harvesting**: The character runs straight to the middle and does a single AoE harvest. **Requirement**: Plots must be tightly packed in a circle around the center so everything is within range.
task.GiftOperator.label: 🎁Gift to Operator
task.GiftOperator.description:
Give a gift to a lucky operator and collect their gift in return (if any).
Note: This task requires the "Win32-Front" controller. Do not move the mouse during execution, as it may cause the task to fail. Prerecorded movement is recommended; recognition-based navigation (MapTracker) may still be unstable.
option.GiftOperatorMoveMode.label: Move to Contact Console
option.GiftOperatorMoveMode.description: Choose whether to reach the operator contact console using a prerecorded key sequence or recognition-based navigation. Prerecorded movement is recommended; MapTracker may still be unstable.
